items.headline: MiSTer Companion v3.4.0 Released
items.message:
MiSTer Companion v3.4.0 is now available.

This update introduces the new Extras tab, adding support for optional tools and add-ons. The 3SX (Street Fighter III - 3rd Strike PORT) installer is now included for easy setup directly from the app.

ZapScripts has been fully overhauled and can now launch both scripts and games via Zaparoo, with improved reliability and clearer feedback.

Stability and internal structure have also been improved to support these new features.

You can download the latest stable release below.

items.headline: Help Bring MiSTer Companion to macOS
items.message:
macOS support is now being actively worked on, with recent improvements contributed by DoggyChicken.

To continue improving and properly maintain macOS support long-term, having access to a Mac for development and testing is still essential. At the moment, I rely on community contributions and am unable to test macOS-specific changes directly.

If you'd like to help make this possible, consider supporting the Ko-fi goal below.
